title: tabernaemontana orientalis
intro: Tabernaemontana orientalis, also known as the Yellow Balloon vine, is a plant species native to the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific Islands. It is a climber with bright yellow and greenish-yellow flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Tabernaemontana orientalis include its potential in treating fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use in reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
